Convert this SRS skip logic to Avni format: Skip Logic Rule from Mobile Creche - Form: Child background details
Target field: Was the child ever breastfed?
SHOW this field when: Always
This SRS rule should be converted to an Avni declarative rule or JavaScript ViewFilter rule using FormElementStatusBuilder.

To convert this SRS skip logic to Avni, you need to create either a declarative rule (JSON) or a JavaScript ViewFilter rule. The declarative format uses conditions with compoundRule, lhs (concept reference with scope), operator, and rhs (answer reference). You'll need the exact concept UUIDs from concepts.json.

          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const encounter = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const _ = imports.lodash;\n  let visibility = true;\n  let value = null;\n  let answersToSkip = [];\n  let validationErrors = [];\n  \n  const condition11 = new imports.rulesConfig.RuleCondition({encounter, formElement}).when.valueInEncounter(\"5cedbd4e-d4c4-440d-8c94-85506073af1a\").containsAnswerConceptName(\"874d4f0c-817f-4b79-8382-d5d5567ea958\").matches();\n  const condition12 = new imports.rulesConfig.RuleCondition({encounter, formElement}).when.valueInEncounter(\"00d2c528-aa9c-498a-a387-19a755c07764\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(\"b3841ebd-1f26-474d-9574-58d7bb4c9f6f\",\"975af8e3-dfc2-40b7-bb5d-099640cc3ec8\",\"d8af94b4-1773-4b57-bb23-b50e23755fd2\",).matches();\n  \n \n  const isDateOfTrainingDefined = new imports.rulesConfig.RuleCondition({encounter, formElement}).when.valueInEncounter(\"56270f45-7d1e-4793-b9ab-278e3d43965e\").defined.matches();\n  \n  visibility = condition11 && condition12;\n  \n  if(isDateOfTrainingDefined){\n    const dateOfTraining = moment(encounter.getObservationValue('56270f45-7d1e-4793-b9ab-278e3d43965e'));\n    const currentDate = moment();\n    if(dateOfTraining.isAfter(currentDate)){\n      validationErrors.push('Training date cannot be a future date.');\n    }\n  }\n  \n  return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, visibility, value, answersToSkip, validationErrors);\n};",

  "decisionRule": "",
  "visitScheduleRule": "\"use strict\";\n({ params, imports }) => {\n  const encounter = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const scheduleBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.VisitScheduleBuilder({ encounter });\n\n    const visitDate = encounter.earliestVisitDateTime || encounter.encounterDateTime;\n    const scheduledOrCompletedEncountersOfType = (type, nextVisitDate) => {\n      const nextDateMonth = moment(nextVisitDate).month();\n      const nextDateYear = moment(nextVisitDate).year();\n      const data = encounter.individual.encounters.filter((enc) =>\n        enc.encounterType.name === type &&\n        enc.voided == false &&\n        moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime).year() == nextDateYear &&\n        moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime).month() == nextDateMonth);\n      return data;\n    };\n    \n    const nextDate = moment(visitDate).add(1, 'M').startOf('month').toDate();\n    const condition11 = scheduledOrCompletedEncountersOfType(\"District Team Capacity Building\", nextDate).length > 0;\n\n    if (!condition11) {\n      const earliestDate = nextDate;\n      const maxDate = moment(earliestDate).add(26, 'days').toDate();\n      scheduleBuilder.add({name: \"District Team Capacity Building\",encounterType: \"District Team Capacity Building\",earliestDate,maxDate});\n    }\n\n  return scheduleBuilder.getAll();\n};\n",
  "validationRule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const encounter = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const validationResults = [];\n  \n  if(encounter.earliestVisitDateTime > encounter.encounterDateTime){\n     validationResults.push(imports.common.createValidationError(\"Visit cannot be done earlier\"));  \n  }\n  \n  return validationResults;\n};",
  "checklistsRule": "",
  "decisionConcepts": []
}

  "decisionRule": "//SAMPLE RULE EXAMPLE\n  \"use strict\";\n({params, imports}) => {\n    const programEncounter = params.entity;\n    const decisions = params.decisions;\n    \n    const complicationsBuilder1 = new imports.rulesConfig.complicationsBuilder({\n        programEncounter: programEncounter,\n        complicationsConcept: \"Gestational age category at birth\"\n    });\n    \n    if (imports.motherCalculations.gestationalAgeCategoryAsOn) {\n        const gestationaAge = imports.motherCalculations.gestationalAgeCategoryAsOn(programEncounter.findObservation(\"Date of delivery\").getValue(), programEncounter.programEnrolment)\n\n        complicationsBuilder1.addComplication(gestationaAge)\n            .whenItem(true).is.truthy;\n\n        decisions.encounterDecisions.push(complicationsBuilder1.getComplications());\n    }\n       \n\nconst complicationsBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.complicationsBuilder({\n        programEncounter: programEncounter,\n        complicationsConcept: \"High Risk Conditions\"\n    });\n    \n    complicationsBuilder.addComplication('Multiple Births')\n        .when.valueInEncounter(\"Number of babies\").is.greaterThan(1);\n\n    \n    decisions.encounterDecisions.push(complicationsBuilder.getComplications());\n\n    \n    return decisions;\n};",

          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const individual = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const _ = imports.lodash;\n  let visibility = true;\n  let value = null;\n  let answersToSkip = [];\n  let validationErrors = [];\n  \n  const condition11 = new imports.rulesConfig.RuleCondition({individual, formElement}).when.valueInRegistration(\"17d911ad-18a5-4903-b43e-32d4674e86f0\").defined.matches();\n  \n  if(condition11 ){\n    value = individual.getObservationValue(\"17d911ad-18a5-4903-b43e-32d4674e86f0\");  \n}\n  \n  return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, visibility, value, answersToSkip, validationErrors);\n};",

  "decisionRule": "\"use strict\";\n({params, imports}) => {\n    const individual = params.entity;\n    const moment = imports.moment;\n    const decisions = params.decisions;\n    const enrolmentDecisions = [];\n    const encounterDecisions = [];\n    const registrationDecisions = [];\n    \n    function toStartCase(str) {\n        return str\n        .trim()\n        .toLowerCase()\n        .split(/[\\s]+/)\n        .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1))\n        .join(' ');\n    }  \n      \n    const tola = individual.getObservationReadableValue(\"5e259bfe-07a8-4c88-a712-d22b9a612429\");\n    const block = individual.getObservationReadableValue(\"e2d35dee-c34f-4f54-a68b-f32ee81835b6\");\n    const village = individual.getObservationReadableValue(\"16b4db7c-e0a8-41f1-ac67-07470a762d9f\");\n  \n    if(tola){\n        registrationDecisions.push({name: \"Tola / Mohalla\", value:toStartCase(tola) });  \n    }\n    if(block){\n        registrationDecisions.push({name: \"Other Block\", value:toStartCase(block) });  \n    }\n    if(village){\n        registrationDecisions.push({name: \"Other Village\", value:toStartCase(village) });  \n    }\n\n  \n    decisions.enrolmentDecisions.push(...enrolmentDecisions);\n    decisions.encounterDecisions.push(...encounterDecisions);\n    decisions.registrationDecisions.push(...registrationDecisions);\n    return decisions;\n};",

  "visitScheduleRule": "//SAMPLE RULE EXAMPLE\n\"use strict\";\n({ params, imports }) => {\n  const encounter = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const scheduleBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.VisitScheduleBuilder({\n    encounter\n  });\n\n  // Check if there is already a scheduled encounter of \"School Annual Form\" excluding the current one\n  const isAlreadyScheduledEncounter = encounter.individual.scheduledEncountersOfType('School Annual Form')\n    ? encounter.individual.scheduledEncountersOfType('School Annual Form').filter(enc => !_.isEqual(enc.uuid, encounter.uuid)) : [];\n\n  // Proceed only if no similar encounter is already scheduled\n  if (isAlreadyScheduledEncounter.length === 0) {\n\n    //add new visit schedule object to scheduleBuilder\n    const getNextApril = (date) => {\n      const month = moment(date).add(6, 'H').month();\n      const year = moment(date).add(6, 'H').year();\n      if (month < 3) return moment({ year: year, month: 3, day: 1 });\n      return moment({ year: year + 1, month: 3, day: 1 });\n    };\n\n    const scheduledOrCompletedEncountersOfType = (type, nextVisitDate) => {\n      const nextDateMonth = moment(nextVisitDate).month();\n      const nextDateYear = moment(nextVisitDate).year();\n      const data = encounter.individual.encounters.filter((enc) =>\n        enc.encounterType.name === type &&\n        enc.voided == false &&\n        enc.cancelDateTime == null &&\n        moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime).add(6, 'H').year() == nextDateYear &&\n        moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime).add(6, 'H').month() == nextDateMonth\n      );\n      return data;\n    };\n\n    const visitDate = encounter.earliestVisitDateTime || encounter.encounterDateTime;\n    const annual_date = getNextApril(visitDate);\n    const condition11 = scheduledOrCompletedEncountersOfType('School Annual Form', annual_date).length > 0;\n\n    if (!condition11) {\n      const earliestDate = moment(annual_date).add(6, 'H').toDate();\n      \n      const nextYear = moment(earliestDate).year() + 1;\n      const maxDate = moment().set({ year: nextYear, month: 2 }).endOf('month').subtract(6, 'H').toDate();\n      \n      scheduleBuilder.add({\n        name: \"School Annual Form\",\n        encounterType: \"School Annual Form\",\n        earliestDate,\n        maxDate\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  return scheduleBuilder.getAll();\n};",
  "validationRule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const encounter = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const validationResults = [];\n  \n  if(encounter.earliestVisitDateTime > encounter.encounterDateTime){\n     validationResults.push(imports.common.createValidationError(\"Visit cannot be done earlier\"));  \n  }\n  \n  return validationResults;\n};",
  "checklistsRule": "",
  "decisionConcepts": [],
  "_note": "Truncated: 16 more groups omitted"
}

          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n    const programEncounter = params.entity;\n    const moment = imports.moment;\n    const formElement = params.formElement;\n    const _ = imports.lodash;\n    let visibility = true;\n    let value = null;\n    let answersToSkip = [];\n    let validationErrors = [];\n\n    const encounters = programEncounter.programEnrolment.getEncountersOfType('Growth Monitoring');\n    let enc1 = _.chain(encounters)\n        .filter((enc) => !_.isNil(enc.encounterDateTime) && !_.isNil(enc.earliestVisitDateTime) && _.isNil(enc.cancelDateTime))\n        .filter((enc) => enc.uuid !== programEncounter.uuid)\n        .filter((enc) => enc.encounterDateTime < programEncounter.encounterDateTime)\n        .sortBy((enc) => -imports.moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime)) \n        .nth(0)\n        .value();\n\n    let enc2 = _.chain(encounters)\n        .filter((enc) => !_.isNil(enc.encounterDateTime) && !_.isNil(enc.earliestVisitDateTime) && _.isNil(enc.cancelDateTime))\n        .filter((enc) => enc.uuid !== programEncounter.uuid)\n        .filter((enc) => enc.encounterDateTime < programEncounter.encounterDateTime)\n        .sortBy((enc) => -imports.moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime))\n        .nth(1)\n        .value();\n\n    let enc1Weight = null, enc2Weight = null;\n    let currentWeight = programEncounter.getObservationReadableValue('Weight');\n    if (enc1) {\n        enc1Weight = enc1.getObservationReadableValue('Weight');\n        \n    }\n    if (enc2) {\n        enc2Weight = enc2.getObservationReadableValue('Weight');\n        \n    }\n     \n    if(enc1Weight && enc2Weight && (currentWeight <= enc1Weight) && (enc1Weight <= enc2Weight)){\n          value = \"GF2\"; // If current weight is less than the second last 2 weights, GF status is GF2 \n    } else if(enc1Weight && (currentWeight <= enc1Weight)){\n          value = \"GF1\"; // If current weight is less than the last weight, GF status is GF1\n    } else {\n          value = \"None\";\n    }\n\n    return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, visibility, value, answersToSkip, validationErrors);\n};",
          "mandatory": false
        },

          "type": "SingleSelect",
          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const programEncounter = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const _ = imports.lodash;\n  let visibility = false;\n  let value = null;\n  let answersToSkip = [];\n  let validationErrors = [];\n  \n  //const condition11 = new imports.rulesConfig.RuleCondition({programEncounter, formElement}).when.ageInMonths.greaterThanOrEqualTo(36).and.when.ageInMonths.lessThanOrEqualTo(60).matches();\n  let age = moment(programEncounter.earliestVisitDateTime).diff(programEncounter.programEnrolment.individual.dateOfBirth,'months');\n\n  \n  let condition11 =  (age >= 36) && (age<=60);\n  \n  let condition12 = false;\n  \n  \n  const locationProperties = programEncounter.programEnrolment.individual.lowestAddressLevel.locationProperties;  \n  \n  if(locationProperties.length > 0){\n     const locationProperty = locationProperties.filter(prop=>prop.concept.name == 'PPK Village');\n     if(locationProperty.length==1){\n         const valueJSON = locationProperty[0].valueJSON;\n         const answer = JSON.parse(valueJSON).answer;\n         if(answer==\"8ebbf088-f292-483e-9084-7de919ce67b7\"){\n            condition12 = true;\n         } \n     }\n  }\n  \n  visibility = condition11 && condition12;\n  \n  \n  return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, visibility, value, answersToSkip, validationErrors);\n};",

          "rule": "//SAMPLE RULE EXAMPLE\n'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n    const programEncounter = params.entity;\n    const moment = imports.moment;\n    const formElement = params.formElement;\n    const _ = imports.lodash;\n    let visibility = true;\n    let value = null;\n    let answersToSkip = [];\n    let validationErrors = [];\n  \n    const height = programEncounter.getObservationValue(\"Height\");\n    const weight = programEncounter.getObservationValue(\"Weight\");\n    const asOnDate = programEncounter.encounterDateTime;\n    const individual = programEncounter.programEnrolment.individual;\n    const age = programEncounter.programEnrolment.individual.getAgeInMonths();\n\n    const addIfRequired = (decisions, name, value) => {\n        if (value === -0) value = 0;\n        if (value !== undefined) decisions.push({name: name, value: value});\n    };\n\n    const getGradeforZscore = (zScore) => {\n        let grade;\n        if (zScore <= -3) {\n            grade = 3;\n        } else if (zScore > -3 && zScore < -2) {\n            grade = 2;\n        } else if (zScore >= -2) {\n            grade = 1;\n        }\n        return grade;\n    };\n    const zScoresForChild = ruleServiceLibraryInterfaceForSharingModules.common.getZScore(individual, asOnDate, weight, height);\n\n    const zScoreGradeStatusMappingWeightForHeight = [\n        [\"SAM\", -3],\n        [\"MAM\", -2],\n        [\"Normal\", 1],\n        [\"Normal\", 2],\n        [\"Normal\", 3],\n        [\"Normal\", Infinity],\n    ];\n\n    const weightForHeightStatus = function (zScore) {\n        let found = _.find(zScoreGradeStatusMappingWeightForHeight, function (currentStatus) {\n            return zScore <= currentStatus[1];\n        });\n        return found && found[0];\n    };\n\n    const wfhStatus = weightForHeightStatus(zScoresForChild.wfh);\n    const wfhGrade = getGradeforZscore(zScoresForChild.wfh);\n    \n    let nutritionalStatus = wfhStatus;\n    let growthFalteringStatus = '';\n\n    const encounters = programEncounter.programEnrolment.getEncountersOfType('Growth Monitoring');\n    let enc1 = _.chain(encounters)\n        .filter((enc) => !_.isNil(enc.encounterDateTime) && !_.isNil(enc.earliestVisitDateTime) && _.isNil(enc.cancelDateTime))\n        .filter((enc) => enc.uuid !== programEncounter.uuid)\n        .filter((enc) => enc.encounterDateTime < programEncounter.encounterDateTime)\n        .sortBy((enc) => -imports.moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime)) \n        .nth(0)\n        .value();\n\n    let enc2 = _.chain(encounters)\n        .filter((enc) => !_.isNil(enc.encounterDateTime) && !_.isNil(enc.earliestVisitDateTime) && _.isNil(enc.cancelDateTime))\n        .filter((enc) => enc.uuid !== programEncounter.uuid)\n        .filter((enc) => enc.encounterDateTime < programEncounter.encounterDateTime)\n        .sortBy((enc) => -imports.moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime))\n        .nth(1)\n        .value();\n\n    let enc1Weight = null, enc2Weight = null;\n    let currentWeight = programEncounter.getObservationReadableValue('Weight');\n    if (enc1) {\n        enc1Weight = enc1.getObservationReadableValue('Weight');\n        \n    }\n    if (enc2) {\n        enc2Weight = enc2.getObservationReadableValue('Weight');\n        \n    }\n     \n    if(enc1Weight && enc2Weight && (currentWeight <= enc1Weight) && (enc1Weight <= enc2Weight)){\n        growthFalteringStatus = \"GF2\"; // If current weight is less than the second last 2 weights, GF status is GF2 \n    } else if(enc1Weight && (currentWeight <= enc1Weight)){\n        growthFalteringStatus = \"GF1\"; // If current weight is less than the last weight, GF status is GF1\n    } else {\n        growthFalteringStatus = \"None\";\n    }\n\n    visibility = (nutritionalStatus && ['SAM', 'MAM'].includes(nutritionalStatus)) || (growthFalteringStatus && growthFalteringStatus == 'GF2');\n\n    return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, visibility, value, answersToSkip, validationErrors);\n};",
          "mandatory": true
        },

for age z-score\"\n        },\n        {\n            programEnrolment: programEncounter,\n            complicationsConcept: \"High risk condition\"\n        });\n\n    const height =   "visitScheduleRule": "\"use strict\";\n({params, imports}) => {\n    const encounter = params.entity;\n    const moment = imports.moment;\n    const scheduleBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.VisitScheduleBuilder({encounter});\n\n    const encounters = encounter.individual.getEncounters();\n\n    const nextEarliestDate = moment(encounter.earliestVisitDateTime).add(1, 'months').startOf('month');\n\n    const isEncounterAlreadyPresent = encounters.some(enc => \n        !enc.voided && \n        enc.encounterType.name === 'Teachers Capacity Building' && \n        moment(enc.earliestVisitDateTime).isSame(nextEarliestDate, 'day')\n    );\n\n    if (!isEncounterAlreadyPresent) {\n        const earliestDate = nextEarliestDate.toDate();\n        const maxDate = moment(earliestDate).add(26, 'days').toDate();\n        \n        scheduleBuilder.add({\n            name: \"Teachers Capacity Building\", encounterType: \"Teachers Capacity Building\", earliestDate, maxDate\n        });\n    }\n\n    return scheduleBuilder.getAll();\n};",
  "validationRule": "",
  "checklistsRule": "",
  "decisionConcepts": []
}

          "displayOrder": 30.0,
          "type": "MultiSelect",
          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const programEncounter = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const _ = imports.lodash;\n  let visibility = true;\n  let value = null;\n  let answersToSkip = [];\n  let validationErrors = [];\n  \n  const condition11 = new imports.rulesConfig.RuleCondition({programEncounter, formElement}).when.valueInEncounter(\"f7bf1514-0a4e-4815-b4d0-1cbeb078573f\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(\"d7fe6163-7f37-4c16-a765-70d1b8e88a98\",\"81300f66-20ea-4341-a509-97b8498d3165\").matches();\n  \n  visibility = condition11 ;\n  \n  return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, visibility, value, answersToSkip, validationErrors);\n};",
          "declarativeRule": [
            {
              "actions": [
                {
                  "actionType": "showFormElement"
                }
              ],
              "conditions": [
                {
                  "compoundRule": {
                    "rules": [
                      {
                        "lhs": {
                          "type": "concept",
                          "scope": "encounter",
                          "conceptName": "Service Designate",
                          "conceptUuid": "f7bf1514-0a4e-4815-b4d0-1cbeb078573f",
                          "conceptDataType": "Coded"
                        },
                        "rhs": {
                          "type": "answerConcept",
                          "answerConceptNames": [
                            "Medical Officer",
                            "Psychiatrist"
                          ],
                          "answerConceptUuids": [
                            "d7fe6163-7f37-4c16-a765-70d1b8e88a98",
                            "81300f66-20ea-4341-a509-97b8498d3165"
                          ]
                        },
                        "operator": "containsAnyAnswerConceptName"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
          ],
          "mandatory": true
        },

          "displayOrder": 33.0,
          "type": "SingleSelect",
          "rule": "\"use strict\";\n({params, imports}) => {\n    const programEncounter = params.entity;\n    const formElement = params.formElement;\n    \nlet status = programEncounter.getObservationReadableValue('Patient status');\n        let value = '';\n        \nswitch (status) {\n    case 'On-going acute episodes':\n         value = 'Red';\n        break;\n      case 'Patient asymptomatic for less than one year':\n        value = 'Yellow';\n        break;\n      case 'Patient asymptomatic for more than one year & less than 3 acute episodes in the past':\n        value = 'Green';\n        break;\n      case 'Patient asymptomatic for more than one year & 3 or more acute episodes in the past':\n        value = 'Pink';\n        break;\n      case 'Non-compliant patients':\n        value = 'Black';\n        break;\n}     \n    return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, true, value);\n  };",
          "mandatory": false
        },

  "visitScheduleRule": "\"use strict\";\n({ params, imports }) => {\n  const individual = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const scheduleBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.VisitScheduleBuilder({individual});\n  \n  let editFlag = individual.getEncounters().filter(enc => enc.name == 'Screening').length;\n  \n  if(!editFlag ){\n    const earliestDate = moment(individual.registrationDate).add(0, 'days').toDate();\n    //const maxDate = moment(individual.registrationDate).add(-1, 'days').toDate();\n    scheduleBuilder.add({name: \"Screening\", encounterType: \"Screening\", earliestDate, });  \n}\n  \n  return scheduleBuilder.getAll();\n};",

          "displayOrder": 3.0,
          "type": "SingleSelect",
          "rule": "'use strict';\n({ params, imports }) => {\n  const programEnrolment = params.entity;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const statusBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatusBuilder({ programEnrolment, formElement });\n\n  // Validation for Pregnancy Registration Date as per Mamta (MCP) card\n  const pregnancyRegDate = programEnrolment.getObservationValue(\"Pregnancy registration date as per Mamta card\");\n  if (pregnancyRegDate && moment(pregnancyRegDate).isAfter(moment(), 'day')) {\n    statusBuilder.validationError(\"Pregnancy registration date can only be a past or current date\");\n  }\n\n  return statusBuilder.build();\n};\n",

        },
        {
          "name": "Last Menstrual Period date (LMP date as per Mamta card/Aanganwadi records)",

            "dataType": "Date",
            "answers": [],
            "active": true,
            "media": []
          },
          "displayOrder": 4.0,
          "type": "SingleSelect",
          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const programEnrolment = params.entity;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const statusBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatusBuilder({programEnrolment, formElement});\n  \n  const lmp = moment(programEnrolment.getObservationValue('Last Menstrual Period date'));\n  const nowMinus495Days = moment().subtract(495, 'days');\n  \n  if (lmp.isBefore(nowMinus495Days)) {\n      statusBuilder.validationError(\"Last Menstrual Period date must be within 495 days from today\");   \n  }\n  if (lmp.isAfter(moment())) {\n      statusBuilder.validationError(\"Last Menstrual Period date must be in the past\");   \n  }\n\n  return statusBuilder.build();\n};\n",
          "mandatory": true
        },
        {
          "name": "Estimated Delivery Date (EDD as per Mamta card/Aanganwadi records)",
          "uuid": "762287da-7844-44a2-8e06-5cedb9f7094f",
          "keyValues": [],
          "concept": {
            "name": "Estimated Delivery Date",
            "uuid": "9c74bdf0-946a-4b2a-972e-2d02f2ec1cff",
            "dataType": "Date",
            "answers": [],
            "active": true,
            "media": []
          },
          "displayOrder": 5.0,
          "type": "SingleSelect",
          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const programEnrolment = params.entity;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const statusBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatusBuilder({ programEnrolment, formElement });\n\n  const edd = programEnrolment.getObservationValue('9c74bdf0-946a-4b2a-972e-2d02f2ec1cff');\n  const lmp = programEnrolment.getObservationValue('dbc34468-812e-4179-9806-b6485215af71');\n  const today = moment();\n  const earliestAllowedDate = moment().subtract(186, 'days');\n  const latestAllowedDate = moment().add(285, 'days');\n\n  if ( edd && moment(edd).isBefore(earliestAllowedDate) ) {\n    statusBuilder.validationError(\"Estimated Delivery Date must not be more than 186 days before today\");   \n  }\n  \n  if ( edd && lmp && moment(edd).isBefore(lmp) ) {\n    statusBuilder.validationError(\"Estimated date of delivery cannot be before LMP\");\n  }\n\n  if ( edd && moment(edd).isAfter(latestAllowedDate) ) {\n    statusBuilder.validationError(\"Estimated Delivery Date must not be more than 285 days from today\");   \n  };\n  \n  if (edd && lmp && moment(edd).isSame(moment(lmp), 'day')) {\n    statusBuilder.validationError(\"LMP and EDD cannot be same\");\n  }\n\n  return statusBuilder.build();\n};\n",

          "type": "SingleSelect",
          "rule": "'use strict';\n({params, imports}) => {\n  const programEnrolment = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const formElement = params.formElement;\n  const _ = imports.lodash;\n\n  let visibility = true;\n  let value = null;\n  let answersToSkip = [];\n  let validationErrors = [];\n\n  const lmp = programEnrolment.getObservationValue('Last Menstrual Period date');\n  const mcpDate = programEnrolment.getObservationValue('Pregnancy registration date as per Mamta card');\n\n  // \u2705 Only continue if both values exist\n  if (lmp && mcpDate) {\n\n    // \u2705 Define moments correctly\n    const lmpMoment = moment(lmp);\n    const mcpMoment = moment(mcpDate);\n\n    // 1\ufe0f\u20e3 MCP must be after LMP\n    if (mcpMoment.isBefore(lmpMoment, 'day')) {\n      validationErrors.push(\"either the MCP card registration or the LMP date is incorrect. Please contact your supervisor for further support.\");\n    } else {\n\n      // 2\ufe0f\u20e3 Calculate difference in months (decimal)\n      const diffMonths = mcpMoment.diff(lmpMoment, 'months', true);\n\n      // 3\ufe0f\u20e3 Apply required category logic\n      if (diffMonths >= 0 && diffMonths < 4) {\n        value = \"In the first 3 months\";\n      } else if (diffMonths >= 4 && diffMonths < 7) {\n        value = \"Between 4-6 months\";\n      } else if (diffMonths >= 7 && diffMonths <= 9) {\n        value = \"Between 7-9 months\";\n      } else {\n        validationErrors.push(\"either the MCP card registration or the LMP date is incorrect. Please contact your supervisor for further support.\");\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(\n    formElement.uuid,\n    visibility,\n    value,\n    answersToSkip,\n    validationErrors\n  );\n};\n",
          "mandatory": false
        }
      ],
      "timed": false,
      "display": "Other Details"
    }
  ],
  "decisionRule": "",
  "visitScheduleRule": "\"use strict\";\n({ params, imports }) => {\n  const programEnrolment = params.entity;\n  const moment = imports.moment;\n  const scheduleBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.VisitScheduleBuilder({ programEnrolment });\n\n  // Check if ANC 1 already exists in encounters\n  const existingANC1 = programEnrolment.getEncounters()\n    .some(enc => enc.encounterType.name === 'ANC');\n\n    const earliestDate = moment(programEnrolment.enrolmentDateTime).toDate();\n    const maxDate = moment(programEnrolment.enrolmentDateTime).add(7, 'days').toDate();\n    const edd = programEnrolment.getObservationValue('9c74bdf0-946a-4b2a-972e-2d02f2ec1cff');\n\n  // Only schedule ANC 1 if it does not already exist\n  if ( moment(earliestDate).isBefore(moment(edd)) && !existingANC1 ) {\n    scheduleBuilder.add({ name: \"ANC 1\", encounterType: \"ANC\", earliestDate, maxDate });\n  }\n\n  return scheduleBuilder.getAll();\n};\n",
  "validationRule": "",
  "checklistsRule": "",
  "decisionConcepts": []
}

  "decisionRule": "//SAMPLE RULE EXAMPLE\n  \"use strict\";\n({params, imports}) => {\n    const programEnrolment = params.entity;\n    const decisions = params.decisions;\n       \n    const medicalHistory = [\n    \"Hypertension\", \"Heart-related Diseases\", \"Diabetes\", \"Sickle Cell\", \"Epilepsy\", \"Renal Disease\",\n    \"HIV/AIDS\", \"Hepatitis B Positive\"\n];\n\nconst pastComplications = [\n    \"Ante Partum Haemorrhage\", \"Intrauterine Growth Retardation\", \"Pre-term labour\", \"Prolonged labour\",\n    \"Instrumental Delivery\", \"LSCS/C-section\", \"Intrauterine death\", \"Threatened abortion\",\n    \"3 or more than 3 spontaneous abortions\", \"Still Birth\", \"Multiple Births\", \"Retained Placenta\",\n    \"Post Partum Haemorrhage (Excessive bleeding after delivery)\", \"Intrapartum Death\", \"Neonatal death within first 28 days\",\"Congenital anomaly\", \"Rh negative in the previous pregnancy\"];\n       \n    const complicationsBuilder = new imports.rulesConfig.complicationsBuilder({\n        programEnrolment: programEnrolment,\n        complicationsConcept: 'High Risk Conditions'\n    });\n\n    complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Puerperal sepsis\")\n        .when.valueInEnrolment(\"Obstetrics history\").containsAnswerConceptName(\"Puerperal sepsis\");\n\n    complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Post abortion complications\")\n        .when.valueInEnrolment(\"Obstetrics history\").containsAnswerConceptName(\"Post abortion complications\");\n\n    complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Under age pregnancy\").when.age.is.lessThan(18);\n\n    complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Old age pregnancy\").when.age.is.greaterThan(30);\n\n    complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Rh Negative Blood Group\")\n        .when.valueInRegistration(\"Blood group\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(\"AB-\", \"O-\", \"A-\", \"B-\");\n        \n    complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Puerperal sepsis\")\n        .when.valueInEnrolment(\"Obstetrics history\").containsAnswerConceptName(\"Puerperal sepsis\");\n\n        .when.valueInEnrolment(\"Number of abortions\").is.greaterThan(0);\n\n   complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Grand Multipara\")\n        .when.valueInEnrolment(\"Gravida\").is.greaterThanOrEqualTo(5);\n     \n   complicationsBuilder.addComplication(\"Primigravida\")\n        .when.valueInEnrolment(\"Gravida\").equals(1);\n    \n programEnrolment,\n        complicationsConcept: 'Recommendations'\n    });\n\n    institutionalDelivery.addComplication(\"Institutional Delivery\").when.age.is.lessThan(18)\n        .or.when.age.is.greaterThan(30)\n        .or.when.valueInRegistration(\"Blood group\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(\"AB-\", \"O-\", \"A-\", \"B-\")\n        .or.when.valueInRegistration(\"Medical .or.when.valueInEnrolment(\"Gravida\").is.greaterThanOrEqualTo(5)\n        .or.when.valueInEnrolment(\"Age of youngest child\").asAge.is.lessThan(1)\n        .or.when.valueInEnrolment(\"Obstetrics history\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(...pastComplications)\n        .or.when.valueInEnrolment(\"Infertility treatment\").is.yes;\n    \n    decisions.enrolmentDecisions.push(institutionalDelivery.getComplications());\n\n\n const institutionalDeliveryReasons = new imports.rulesConfig.complicationsBuilder({\n        programEnrolment: programEnrolment,\n        complicationsConcept: 'Reason(s) for Institutional Delivery'\n    });\n\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Under age pregnancy\").when.age.is.lessThan(18);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Old age pregnancy\").when.age.is.greaterThan(30);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Rh Negative Blood Group\").when.valueInRegistration(\"Blood group\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(\"AB-\", \"O-\", \"A-\", \"B-\");\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Medical history\").when.valueInRegistration(\"Medical history\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(...medicalHistory);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Short Stature\").when.valueInEnrolment(\"Height\").is.lessThan(145);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Primigravida\").when.valueInEnrolment(\"Gravida\").is.equals(1);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Grand Multipara\").when.valueInEnrolment(\"Gravida\").is.greaterThanOrEqualTo(5);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Youngest child Less than 1 Year Old\").when.valueInEnrolment(\"Age of youngest child\").asAge.is.lessThan(1);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Obstetrics history\").when.valueInEnrolment(\"Obstetrics history\").containsAnyAnswerConceptName(...pastComplications);\n    institutionalDeliveryReasons.addComplication(\"Infertility treatment\").when.valueInEnrolment(\"Infertility treatment\").is.yes;\n
